docs.title: PR #91: Fix RLS GUC name in graph_nodes policies
docs.content:
PR #91 in prbe-knowledge: Fix RLS GUC name in graph_nodes policies
Author: kiran
Description: Fixes INFRA-33. The RLS policies on graph_nodes and graph_edges were checking app.tenant_id instead of the canonical app.current_customer_id. This caused all Alembic UPDATEs on those tables to silently zero-match.

Changed:
- migrations/versions/0048_fix_rls_guc_name.py: ALTER POLICY to use app.current_customer_id

docs.title: INFRA-33: graph_nodes RLS silently returns empty on Alembic updates
docs.content:
Issue INFRA-33: graph_nodes RLS silently returns empty on Alembic updates
Status: Done
Assignee: kiran
Description: Alembic UPDATE migrations on graph_nodes/graph_edges zero-match silently. Root cause: RLS policy checks app.tenant_id but the GUC is set as app.current_customer_id.

expected_edges.note: PR #91 explicitly states it fixes INFRA-33 by correcting the RLS GUC name from app.tenant_id to app.current_customer_id
